name: SetPWMVoltageHigh
title: SetPWMVoltageHigh
description: Specifies the high level on output of a digital output signal, especially a PWM signal.

parameters.name: Voltage
parameters.description: Voltage of the low level in volts in the range 0 ... 27 V (VT2004), 0... 40V (VT2004A) resp. 0 ... 25 V (VT2516).
